name: List Lattice Structure
description: Describes the structure at a path in the user's lattice namespace. Returns the type of value at the path (map, vector, index, set, string, etc.) along with type-specific metadata. For maps: includes keys (with pagination). For vectors/countables: includes count. For sets: includes values directly. Always includes 'exists' (boolean) to distinguish missing paths from null values. Paths use '/' separators. Omit path to describe the top-level user namespace.

path.description: Path to describe, e.g. 'g' (agents namespace), 'g/my-agent' (agent record). Omit to describe top-level.

limit.description: Maximum map keys to return (default 1000). Only applies to map types.

offset.description: Number of map keys to skip (default 0). Only applies to map types.

exists.description: True if data exists at this path

type.description: Value type: map, vector, index, set, string, long, boolean, double, blob, null

keys.description: Map keys (only for map type, may be paginated)

offset.description: Current offset (only present when map keys are truncated)
